query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
| timeslice by {{timeslice}}
|sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes   by _timeslice,user_name
| total bytes as tb by _timeslice
 | bytes / tb as f | if (f <.05,"other",user_name) as user_name
| bytes / 1G as gb
| sum(gb) as gb_scan by _timeslice,user_name | replace (user_name,/@.+/,"") as user_name  
| fillmissing timeslice({{timeslice}}) with 0 for	gb_scan | transpose row _timeslice column user_name

sources.dashboardDescription: A dashboard for viewing search scan overview and trends
sources.panelTitle: Gb Scan Top Users Over Time
